title: Wrova Reusable Small Bowls 10 oz Set of 8 - Unbreakable Dessert Bowl for Kitchen - Mini Bowls for Ice Cream, Snack and Fruits - Microwave & Dishwasher Safe Appetizer Bowl - Multi Colors
features: Practical Handy Bowls: Wrova Small Dessert Bowls - Hold 10 oz to the rim - Perfect for desserts, ice cream, fruits, meal prep, small snacks, and dipping sauces - Can be easily held with one hand - Ideal size and texture for a great touch and feel

Dishwasher & Microwave Safe: Wrova reusable bowls are Microwave and Dishwasher safe, temperature resistance ranges from -4°F to 248°F. Also available for Freezer. Easy to clean and store,our ice cream bowls make your life more convenient
Non-toxic & Safe for Use: Wrova dessert bowls set of 8 are constructed with food-grade PP, BPA free, non-toxi. Additionally,these mini bowls are anti-scald,anti-cold

Unbreakable & Vibrant Color: Enjoy worry-free snacking with Wrova 10oz Snack Bowls - the unbreakable solution to messy snacking. With four delightful colors - blue, green, yellow, and orange red - these bowls will quickly become you favorite for desserts, ice cream, and more without the fear of accidental spills or breakage
Versatile: Wrova reusable small bowls are lightweight, suitable for ice cream, dessert, fruits and appetizer, etc. Whether indoor or out door, our snack bowls can meet daily use
Ideal Reusable Bowls Option: This reusable bowl is an alternative to disposable dinnerware and can be used over and over again. Sturdy in daily use, this unbreakable bowl shrugs off drops and bumps
